what: explore complete: formalized index.ts API barrel + firewall, reworked cli.ts to consume it, added surface test + changeset; authored symmetric api/ + cli/ spec split

cause: spec-judge CHANGE verdict: missing diff-rename coverage, stale AXI #8 wording in axi/README + ADR, stale stderr stream-discipline in ADR
fix: added rename scenario (api/diff), validate-ENOENT and parse tag-without-@ scenarios; corrected #8 and stream-discipline wording in axi/README and 0001-adopt-axi.md

cause: impl-judge CHANGE verdict: 13 frozen scenarios behaved correctly but lacked a test pinning their Then-clause (outline exampleRows, multi-file aggregation, mixed validate/diff batches, real-git GitError, import-no-side-effect, cli --full/--tag/--ast wiring, cli diff changed-run render+help, stderr fallback channel)
fix: added 13 behavior-pinning tests plus a purely-additive diff fixture; no src change (behavior already correct); suite 49→85 tests, all green

what: impl gate PASS: cold impl-judge verified all 55 frozen scenarios; 85 tests pass, typecheck+build clean

additive revision (user feedback): added injectable FileReader seam to parseFeatures/validateFeatures/parseFeaturesAst (default nodeFileReader), exported FileReader/nodeFileReader/gitReader for cyber-mux-style DI testing; added 3 additive frozen scenarios (self-clear) + verifications; removed the confusing firewall section from the website overview and documented the reader DI instead. 85->91 tests, all green; CLI unchanged

user-ratified re-open + API redesign: renamed engines parseFeatures->parse, parseFeaturesAst->parseAst, validateFeatures->validate, diffFeatures->diff; moved the injected dependency out of options into a separate 3rd deps param typed as narrow ISP role interfaces (ReadsFile{readFile}, ReadsGitDiff{readDiff}); defaults nodeReadsFile/gitReadsDiff. Reshaped frozen scenarios (injected-reader + surface exports) accordingly, each still verified. 91 tests green; grep of old names returns nothing; CLI unchanged
